narrative:
Turtlecreek Twp C (precinct in Warren County) has 687 registered voters, with 43.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 45.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 34.8 percentage points.
